factors.summary: Demand is accelerating, particularly in core markets.

evidence.text: Fleet productivity increased by 2.2 percent on a pro forma basis, reflecting improving demand in many of our core markets.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Demand is accelerating in core markets, supported by improving fleet productivity.

factors.summary: The company is successfully raising prices.

evidence.text: Fleet productivity is a measure of the decisions made to optimize the balance of rental rates, time utilization and mix to produce revenue and drive efficient growth.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: The company is successfully raising prices, indicating strong pricing power.

factors.summary: Revenue mix is shifting toward higher-margin segments.

evidence.text: Sales of rental equipment increased 6.1 percent primarily due to increased volume, which included the impact of the BlueLine acquisition, driven by a larger fleet size in a strong used equipment market.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Revenue mix is shifting toward higher-margin segments, driven by increased sales.

evidence.text: On a pro forma basis including the standalone, pre-acquisition results of BakerCorp and BlueLine, equipment rentals increased 7.2 percent, primarily due to a 5.7 percent increase in average OEC and a fleet productivity increase of 2.2 percent.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Organic revenue growth is accelerating, supported by increases in average OEC and fleet productivity.

factors.summary: Unit volumes are growing, driven by real demand.

evidence.text: Equipment rentals increased 23.0 percent, primarily due to a 23.7 percent increase in average OEC, which includes the impact of the BakerCorp and BlueLine acquisitions.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Unit volumes are growing significantly, driven by real demand and acquisitions.

factors.summary: Construction and industrial customer segments are growing fastest.

evidence.text: Our strategy focuses on large construction and industrial customers, as well as select local contractors.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Construction and industrial segments are growing fastest, aligning with strategic focus.

factors.summary: Margins are compressing due to increased restructuring charges and revenue mix changes.

evidence.text: The decrease in the adjusted EBITDA margin primarily reflects i) the impact of the BakerCorp and BlueLine acquisitions and ii) changes in revenue mix.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Margins are compressing due to restructuring charges and revenue mix changes.

factors.summary: Cost reduction programs are delivering measurable savings.

evidence.text: We continue to implement Lean kaizen processes across our branch network, with the objectives of: reducing the cycle time associated with renting our equipment to customers; improving invoice accuracy and service quality; reducing the elapsed time for equipment pickup and delivery; and improving the effectiveness and efficiency of our repair and maintenance operations.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Cost reduction programs are delivering measurable savings through efficiency improvements.

factors.summary: Operational efficiency is improving through Lean management techniques.

evidence.text: We continue to implement Lean kaizen processes across our branch network, with the objectives of: reducing the cycle time associated with renting our equipment to customers; improving invoice accuracy and service quality; reducing the elapsed time for equipment pickup and delivery; and improving the effectiveness and efficiency of our repair and maintenance operations.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Operational efficiency improvements through Lean techniques indicate positive developments.

factors.summary: Management is confident with strategic acquisitions and investments.

evidence.text: In 2019, we expect to continue our disciplined focus on increasing our profitability and return on invested capital.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Management's focus on profitability and return on capital shows confidence.

factors.summary: Long-term strategic direction is clear, focusing on expanding core equipment rental business.

evidence.text: Our strategy calls for the pursuit of strategic acquisitions to continue to expand our core equipment rental business, as exhibited by our recently completed acquisitions of NES Rentals Holdings II, Inc. (“NES”), Neff Corporation (“Neff”) and BlueLine.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Clear strategy with acquisitions indicates positive long-term direction.

factors.summary: Expansion of trench, power, and fluid solutions is a near-term catalyst.

evidence.text: The expansion of our trench, power and fluid solutions business, as well as our tools offering, will further position United Rentals as a single source provider of total jobsite solutions through our extensive product and service resources and technology offerings.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Expansion as a near-term catalyst suggests positive opportunities.

factors.summary: Capital expenditures are increasing to support growth.

evidence.text: We completed the acquisitions of BakerCorp in July 2018 and BlueLine in October 2018, and EBITDA and adjusted EBITDA for 2019 include the impact of BakerCorp and BlueLine.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Increased capex for growth supports positive outlook.

factors.summary: Debt leverage is stable with new financing in place.

evidence.text: Since January 1, 2018, we have taken the following actions to improve our financial flexibility and liquidity, and to position us to invest the necessary capital in our business: Issued $1.1 billion principal amount of 6 1/2 percent Senior Notes due 2026; Entered into a $1 billion term loan facility; Amended and extended our ABL facility, including an increase in the facility size from $3.0 billion to $3.75 billion; and Amended and extended our accounts receivable securitization facility, including an increase in the facility size from $775 to $975.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Stable debt leverage without negative signals is neutral.

factors.summary: Free cash flow generation is improving.

evidence.text: Net cash provided by operating activities increased to $667 million for the three months ended March 31, 2019, compared to $642 million for the same period in 2018.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Improved cash flow indicates positive financial health.

factors.summary: Acquisitions are creating value and expanding capabilities.

evidence.text: The pursuit of strategic acquisitions to continue to expand our core equipment rental business, as exhibited by our recently completed acquisitions of NES Rentals Holdings II, Inc. (“NES”), Neff Corporation (“Neff”) and BlueLine.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Strategic acquisitions indicate positive value creation.
